title: My Beer Run Of The Future: QR Codes And Real-Time Payments
excerpt: How can QR Codes and instant payments make beer taste better? Matera Co-founder and CEO, Carlos Netto, highlights his experience in Brazil and how QR code payments can streamline
body:
How can QR Codes and instant payments make beer taste better? Matera Co-founder and CEO, Carlos Netto, highlights his experience in Brazil and how QR code payments can streamline operations, enhance security and offer a better customer experience.

Read the full article on Forbes.com [here](https://www.forbes.com/councils/forbestechcouncil/2024/09/09/my-beer-run-of-the-future-qr-codes-and-real-time-payments/).
